hooks.command: echo '🔍 Pre-commit checks will run via git hooks. Ensure all tests pass before committing.'

cd /home/user/chartora/backend && ruff check src/ tests/ && echo '✅ Backend lint passed' && ruff format --check src/ tests/ && echo '✅ Backend format passed' && cd /home/user/chartora/frontend && npx tsc --noEmit 2>&1 | grep -v 'tests/' | grep -v 'vitest' | grep -v 'setup.ts' | grep 'error TS' && echo '❌ Frontend type errors found' && exit 1 || echo '✅ Frontend type check passed'
echo '📋 Remember: TDD workflow — write tests first, then implementation. Verify tests pass before committing.'
